ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning method used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES method_types ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the metrics */,
  "f1score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "quadloss" REAL /* Quadratic loss of the model */,
  "mean_squared_error" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mean_absolute_error" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_types" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the method (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the log */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the experiment */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metrics" (
  "dataset_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset to which the metrics belong */,
  "num_of_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_of_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "missing_value_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of missing values in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric related to the result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimentation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimentation_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the model version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the collaborator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
